decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
nav_style: hamburger menu icon only (even on desktop)
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
border_radius: mixed — sharp sections with rounded cards
quirk: the entire page has a max-width of 900px, ultra-focused
